arts.ttl: QPR v Bristol City line-ups: Four Rangers changes
arts.sum: QPR make four changes from the midweek win at Oxford, with Harrison Ashby, Yang Min-hyeok and Karamoko Dembele given starting places and Koki Saito returning from suspension. Ashby has been given the nod ahead of Morgan Fox to replace Kenneth Paal, who is out injured along with Sam Field. Paul Smyth and Daniel Bennie drop […] The post QPR v Bristol City line-ups: Four Rangers changes appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss lays out Rob Atkinson return timeline after Bristol City loanee's recent absence
arts.sum: Portsmouth boss John Mousinho has set out the potential timeline for Rob Atkinson to make his return from injury, suggesting Pompey's Good Friday clash with Norwich City could be the right time for the Bristol City loanee to feature in the starting line-up. After an impressive start in Portsmouth colours, Atkinson was forced off with a calf injury in the first half of Mousinho's side's win over QPR in February and has since missed each of Pompey's last seven matches.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning makes simple request of Bristol City fans travelling to Loftus Road for QPR clash
arts.sum: Liam Manning has made a straightforward request to the Bristol City fans travelling to Loftus Road for the Robins' clash with QPR, urging them to "give everything" and "enjoy it" as the Reds look to boost their play-off hopes against Marti Cifuentes' side. Throughout the campaign so far, Manning has urged both his playing squad and the City supporters to enjoy the journey rather than focus on the potential outcomes at the end of the season as the Robins battle for a place in the top six of the Championship.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning shares Scott Twine update ahead of QPR clash after recent Bristol City absence
arts.sum: Liam Manning insists Scott Twine has "a chance" of featuring for Bristol City against QPR, with the Robins boss admitting the attacking midfielder is "desperate" to feature at Loftus Road. Bristol City travel to Loftus Road to face QPR on Saturday afternoon as they look to boost their play-off hopes

arts.ttl: Karamoko Dembele fulfils life after Celtic dream as QPR star buzzes over career first
arts.sum: The former Hoops youngster savoured an 'unforgettable' moment in mid week

arts.ttl: Haydon Roberts on last-minute winner dreams, play-off push and 'special' Bristol City connection
arts.sum: As Haydon Roberts made his way into the press conference room just a matter of minutes after Bristol City's win over West Brom, it was impossible not to notice the beaming smile brandished across the defender's face as he quickly switched off his phone, which was undoubtedly awash with messages from family and friends, and took his seat behind the desk. Haydon Roberts on last-minute winner dreams, play-off push and'special' Bristol City connection

arts.ttl: 'That's the mad thing' - Liam Manning makes transfer point amid Bristol City's fight for top six
arts.sum: Liam Manning believes the fact his Bristol City squad was arguably "weakened" during the January transfer window has helped bring the group closer together as they look to book a place in the Championship play-off places. Atkinson and Naismith's departures left just Rob Dickie, Zak Vyner and Luke McNally as the only recognised centre-backs at Manning's disposal and only a matter of weeks after transfer deadline day, the latter's season was brought to a premature end when he suffered a knee injury in City's defeat to Swansea.

arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Queens Park Rangers and Bristol City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Championship: Predictions for all 12 weekend games
arts.sum: The finishing line is coming into view in the Championship but there remains plenty to play for as Aaron Ashley previews all 12 games in the second tier this weekend.
